Perfect! I've found the method. The `get_default` method on the `Parameter` class is responsible for resolving default values at command-execution time. Looking at the code, you can see that on line 2289-2290, if `call=True` (the default) and the value is callable, it calls the function immediately: `value = value()`.

This is the method that would cause a callable default to be invoked each time it's resolved during command execution.

```json
{"method":"get_default","file":"src/click/core.py","class":"Parameter"}
```
